raw: build memory MCP server, use immediately in Claude Code. No landing, no SaaS, just working MCP.

product_summary.what: Local-first MCP memory server. Install once, plug into Claude Code via `claude mcp add`, agent has persistent memory.
product_summary.stack_choice: TypeScript + @modelcontextprotocol/sdk + better-sqlite3 + sqlite-vec + @xenova/transformers (local embed, no API key needed)
